ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot gently cradling a small, precious object, represented by the blue diamond. The movement will be slow and deliberate, emphasizing care and protection.  The robot will use both arms to create a secure, protective space. Frame 1 will show the arms in a neutral position. Frame 2 will show the arms beginning to move toward each other, slightly below shoulder height. Frame 3 will depict the arms meeting, forming a cradle shape to protect the diamond. Frame 4 will show a slight adjustment to ensure secure holding. Frame 5 will show the arms gently returning to a resting position after the diamond is secured.

frames.beat: arms hang loosely at sides, ready to receive
arms begin to lift and move inward gently
arms meet, forming a protective cradle
a slight adjustment to secure the precious object
arms return to rest, object safely held
